title: RSW Pack Of 6 Christmas Games Crackers Doodle Dasher 6 Fun Drawing Family Dinner Crackers 9Inch
features: RSW International Ltd Christmas Cracker 6 PackDoodle Dash(er)Family Game Crackers
description: Warning! Adult supervision is required. Contents are not suitable for persons under 14 years of age. Never remove the cord, do not pull on the cord outside the cracker. Hold away from the face and pull. Pull both ends of the cracker with a sharp tug at arm's length. When pulling, make sure to keep out of reach of the face, food, fragile objects, other people and pets! Do not pull near eyes and ears! Misuse can cause hearing damage. Objects can fall out of the cracker when pulling.
